description: Create CLI command structure with Cobra: Set up cobra commands in cmd/ directory. Commands: 'wt' (default: launch TUI), 'wt config add <name> <path>' (add project), 'wt config list' (list projects), 'wt config init' (create default config). Root command should load config and launch TUI if no subcommand. Add persistent flags for --config to specify custom config path.
note: Successfully implemented Cobra CLI structure with root command, config subcommands (add, list, init), persistent --config flag, and main.go integration. All acceptance criteria verified.
acceptance_criteria: cmd/root.go exists with cobra root command setup
cmd/config.go exists with config subcommands: add, list, init
Root command launches TUI when run with no arguments: wt
wt config add <name> <path> adds project to config
wt config list displays all configured projects
wt config init creates ~/.config/wt/config.yaml with empty projects list
Persistent flag --config allows custom config path
